all_scores.description: The charts illustrate the sigmoid function's application in converting linear scores to probabilities in a classification context, with a 3D view of decision boundaries and 2D curves representing various signal strengths.
This chart shows ROC and Precision-Recall curves for different models used in a Silicon Timing Test.
The chart shows classification performance metrics for a machine learning model, including a confusion matrix and analysis of threshold trade-offs.
The chart shows a logistic regression decision boundary and predicted probability distributions for two classes (PASS and FAIL).
The chart shows data distribution before and after applying SMOTE to balance class ratios in an authenticity dataset.
